parameters.command:
set -e

echo "TICKET_ANALYSIS_START"

# Replace this section with your real report source if needed.
# The workflow expects plain text or JSON-ish output that can be parsed downstream.
if [ -n "${TICKET_ANALYSIS_SOURCE:-}" ] && [ -f "${TICKET_ANALYSIS_SOURCE}" ]; then
  cat "${TICKET_ANALYSIS_SOURCE}"
else
  echo "No ticket-analysis source file provided."
  echo "Set TICKET_ANALYSIS_SOURCE to a file path on the SSH target."
fi
